summary: Colleen is building AI-powered SEO agents and Meta ad pipelines for clients.
  Joe reveals a secret product that packages Rails apps into iOS apps with one click.
---

<p>Colleen is building AI-powered SEO agents and Meta ad pipelines for clients. Joe reveals a secret product that packages Rails apps into iOS apps with one click. They debate whether AI automations actually deliver business value, and why breaking out of the tech Twitter bubble might be the real moat.</p><p></p><p>Chapters</p><ul><li>00:00 Introduction and Solo Work Retreat</li><li>05:48 Automating Content Generation</li><li>13:05 Meta Ads and Custom Landing Pages</li><li>20:59 Challenges of AI Marketing Products</li><li>26:04 Exploring New Markets</li><li>33:44 Automating Mobile App Development</li><li>39:14 Product Launch Strategy</li></ul>
